Since Oct25, the IMF has gradually raised its Latin American real GDP growth forecasts by 30 bp, now expecting 2.9% growth over 2025-30. Brazil remains a laggard by 50-60 bp.
#oott #tankers https://t.co/6ZVZv1dd57

ECSA represents 71% of Latin American real GDP on a PPP basis, and its 2.9% growth over 2025-30 mirrors the Latam average. Oil production growth is driving both GUY and SUR performance, with the offshore GranMorgu project boosting SUR starting in 2028.

Strait of Hormuz only saw six vessels transit on Sundy and "Most of them switched off their transponders while crossing."

Thx @kpler @staunovo #oott
quoted_text:
We can now bring you more information about the six vessels that transited the Strait of Hormuz on Sunday, based on ship-tracking data from Kpler.

Tankers that exited included the Very Large Crude Carrier, Humanity, laden with 2 million barrels of Iranian oil.

Another tanker, Capetan Andreas, carrying about 500,000 barrels of Kuwaiti oil products, the data showed, while three empty tankers entered the Gulf to load oil.

Most of them switched off their transponders while crossing.
